title: Students and one side headaches: 10 herbal creams to try
description: Mentha x piperita creams, also known as peppermint creams, may provide relief from one-sided headaches. This is because peppermint contains compounds like menthol and menthone, which have natural pain-relieving and anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically to the affected area, these compounds can help reduce pain and inflammation, making it a potential remedy for one-sided headaches.
